title: Verify UI and copy across all components for tone and accuracy
description: Test that all UI components (widget, hub, pop-ups) display the correct, non-threatening, and empowering copy as specified in the PRD.
preconditions: User has an active trial with 6 days remaining.

steps.description: 1. View the homepage widget and verify copy: 'Trial Mode: 6 Days Remaining. Manage Control Center →'.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner and verify copy: 'Your ₹1 trial is active.' and 'Easy cancellation anytime. No hidden loops.'
3. Initiate cancellation and verify Loss Aversion pop-up copy: 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
4. Proceed to the incentive offer and verify Trust Clause copy.

expected_result: All copy on all components matches the PRD exactly, maintaining the intended transparent and empowering tone.
